_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. App fetches this on launch to know latest version. Bump version + summary when ToS/Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v2.5 校正：移除已下線的句子收藏 snapshot 機制與 18+ 雜湊保留條目；刪除即時生效；閒置終止對齊 24 個月
terms.summary_en: v2.5 corrections: removed retired snapshot mechanism and 18+ hash retention; deletion takes effect immediately; dormancy termination aligned to 24 months

privacy.summary_zh: v2.5 校正：刪除即時生效；移除已下線的句子收藏 snapshot 章節與 18+ 雜湊保留；檢舉/停權保留改目的限制式描述
privacy.summary_en: v2.5 corrections: deletion takes effect immediately; removed retired bookshelf-snapshot section and 18+ hash retention; report/suspension retention reworded to purpose-limited
